# Purview — Multi-State Privacy Compliance for Small Businesses

> Purview is a multi-state US privacy compliance platform for small and mid-sized businesses. We determine which state privacy laws apply to your business, track compliance status across all applicable states, generate attorney-reviewed privacy policies, and provide step-by-step implementation guidance. Think "TurboTax for privacy compliance."

Every marketing page on this site is mirrored at a parallel `.md` URL that returns clean, structured markdown with zero HTML/CSS/JS noise. Use those URLs for high-fidelity ingestion.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://getpurview.com/index.md): Full product overview — hero, problem, features, who it's for, comparison vs. OneTrust/Termly/DIY, pricing, FAQs, and CTAs.
- [Privacy Policy](https://getpurview.com/privacy.md): Purview's privacy policy (currently being finalized).
- [Terms of Service](https://getpurview.com/terms.md): Purview's terms of service (currently being finalized).

## Guides

Comprehensive compliance guides for all 20 US state privacy laws. Each guide has a markdown twin at `/guides/{slug}.md`.

- [Guides index](https://getpurview.com/guides): Listing of all state privacy law guides.

## Blog

The Purview blog publishes guides, analysis, and updates on US state privacy law compliance. Each post has a markdown twin at `/blog/{slug}.md`.

- [Blog index](https://getpurview.com/blog): Listing of all blog posts.
- [Which State Privacy Laws Apply to Your Business?](https://getpurview.com/blog/which-state-privacy-laws-apply.md): Guide explaining which of the 20 US state comprehensive privacy laws apply to a small business based on revenue, consumer data volume, and data sales — with thresholds, penalties, and a recommended action checklist.

## Product (separate domain: app.getpurview.com)

- Website Scanner: https://app.getpurview.com/scan — free 10-second scan that detects trackers (Meta Pixel, Stripe, etc.) and missing consent banners.
- Compliance Quiz: https://app.getpurview.com/quiz — free 5-minute assessment that determines which state privacy laws apply to your business.
- Sign up: https://app.getpurview.com/signup — create an account (Starter, Growth, or Pro plan).
- Log in: https://app.getpurview.com/login — existing customer login.

## Key facts

- Covers 20+ enacted US state comprehensive privacy laws including California (CCPA/CPRA), Virginia (VCDPA), Colorado (CPA), Connecticut (CTDPA), Utah (UCPA), and 16+ additional state laws taking effect through 2026.
- 170+ tracked compliance requirements across all covered states.
- Pricing: Starter $49/mo, Growth $99/mo, Pro $149/mo. Annual billing saves 20% ($39/$79/$119 respectively). Free forever tier includes a website tracker scan and a basic multi-state exposure report.
- Target audience: small and mid-sized businesses — e-commerce stores (Shopify, WooCommerce), SaaS companies, marketing agencies, and growing startups preparing for due diligence.
- Compliance matching engine determines applicable laws based on business revenue, consumer data volume, data sales, and state operations.
- Attorney-reviewed privacy policy generator produces a single multi-state policy using the "strictest standard wins" rule.
- Built on real state attorney general enforcement data (e.g. Todd Snyder $345,000 CA settlement, TicketNetwork $85,000 CT settlement).
- Security: 256-bit data encryption, GDPR-compliant infrastructure, privacy-first design.
- Positioning: lighter and cheaper than OneTrust ($10,000+/yr), more comprehensive than Termly (cookie-only), and faster than DIY compliance.

## Legal disclosure

Purview provides legal information, not legal advice. It is not a law firm. Users with complex situations (HIPAA, GLBA, acquisitions) should consult outside counsel.

- App: https://app.getpurview.com
